---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition to the Swift API surface
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What you want**
Describe the API or capability you'd like.

**Why**
The use case. If it maps to something sudachi.rs already exposes, link it.

**Proposed shape (optional)**
Sketch the Swift signature you have in mind. Note that additions should stay
thin over sudachi.rs — see `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`.
